settings.label: Rewards section copy
settings.default: Track delivery and gift checkpoints as your cart grows.

settings.label: Gift-stage upsell copy
settings.default: Small add-ons that move you closer to the next reward.

settings.label: Delivery-stage upsell copy
settings.default: One useful add-on can remove delivery charges.

settings.label: Complete-stage upsell heading
settings.default: Add more and save more free gifts

settings.label: Complete-stage upsell copy
settings.default: Rewards are active. Add another pantry staple if you need it.

settings.label: Next reward card copy
settings.default: A small add-on can move this order to the next reward.

settings.label: Customer review quote
settings.default: Very fresh aroma compared to supermarket spices. You can feel the difference!

settings.label: Product tag prefix for attribute pills
settings.info: Tags starting with this prefix appear as pills on cart rows. E.g. 'pill:Bold aroma' shows as 'Bold aroma'.

settings.label: Enable Address Intelligence page
settings.info: Routes checkout CTA through /pages/checkout-prep for pincode + COD check.

settings.label: Basil event gateway URL
settings.info: e.g. https://track.pureleven.com/api — leave blank to disable server relay.

settings.label: Microsoft Clarity Project ID
settings.info: Leave blank to disable Clarity session recording.

settings.label: Exit intent coupon code
settings.info: Shown in the exit modal. Leave blank to hide coupon offer.

settings.content: Find this in Theme Editor > Theme settings > Welcome offer popup. Phone captures submit through the Shopify Forms app, so no Cloudflare capture endpoint is required.

settings.label: Body copy
settings.default: Fresh Kerala spices delivered directly from trusted farms.
